reasoning: Initial observation suggests the resistors are in series since the total resistance is the sum of individual resistances. To confirm, I will increase R1 and observe if the total resistance changes accordingly.
The total resistance increased when R1 was increased, confirming the resistors are in series. Next, I will increase R2 to see if the total resistance changes accordingly.

The total resistance increased proportionally when both R1 and R2 were increased, confirming they are in series. The initial observation and subsequent increases suggest the equation for total resistance in series is the sum of individual resistances.
